name: Grilled Sonoma Goat Cheese in Vine Leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the sun-dried tomatoes until flat.
2. Dip each round of goat cheese in olive oil and place a flattened tomato on top and bottom.
3. Wrap the cheese with grape leaves, using 1-2 leaves per portion.
4. Drizzle a little olive oil over the leaves.
5. Grill for 5 minutes on each side.
6. Serve the cheeses on the leaves, using croutons to scoop out melted cheese.
